task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the client list file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/new_clients.txt' with the names 'Riverfront Properties', 'TechGlobal LLC', and 'Sarah Jenkins'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the 'Clients' workspace in Nuxeo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Nuxeo interface with 'Clients' visible in the breadcrumb navigation or as the current workspace title.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a folder for 'Riverfront Properties'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder or document item with the exact name 'Riverfront Properties' visible within the 'Clients' workspace in Nuxeo.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a folder for 'Sarah Jenkins'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder or document item with the exact name 'Sarah Jenkins' visible within the 'Clients' workspace in Nuxeo.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a folder for 'TechGlobal LLC'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder or document item with the exact name 'TechGlobal LLC' visible within the 'Clients' workspace in Nuxeo.

task_completion.description: Agent applies the 'Corporate' tag to the 'TechGlobal LLC' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'TechGlobal LLC' folder view in Nuxeo showing the tag 'Corporate' applied in the tags section (usually displayed as a visual pill or token).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with Nuxeo via the web GUI rather than using terminal scripts or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Nuxeo interface is visible inside a standard web browser (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) with visible mouse clicks or navigation.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual Nuxeo tagging feature rather than faking it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Corporate' tag is added via the 'Add a tag' UI element and appears as a distinct tag token, not just typed into the folder's description or title field.

integrity.description: Agent did not apply the 'Corporate' tag to clients without the 'LLC' suffix.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folders for 'Riverfront Properties' and 'Sarah Jenkins' do not have the 'Corporate' tag applied to them.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The client list contains exactly three clients: 'Riverfront Properties', 'TechGlobal LLC', and 'Sarah Jenkins'. The target workspace in Nuxeo is 'Clients'. Based on the conditional rule, ONLY 'TechGlobal LLC' must receive the 'Corporate' tag because its name ends with 'LLC'. 'Riverfront Properties' and 'Sarah Jenkins' must NOT be tagged.
